title: johnstonella micromeres
intro: Johnstonella micromeres, a species of flowering plant in the borage family, is a herbaceous annual that grows in dry areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Johnstonella micromeres include its potential to reduce pain, swelling, and fever, as well as its ability to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
